title: PoW replay set: DashMap entry() for atomic check-and-insert
description: ws.rs uses DashMap::entry(h16) to atomically check for and insert a replay token. This eliminates the TOCTOU between contains_key() and insert() that would exist with two separate calls. A future contributor might 'simplify' to contains_key() + insert() which would reintroduce the race. The entry() pattern here is correct and should be preserved.
